segments.text: Not that the players can hear this, but...
segments.original_text: 選手の方々に聞こえてないという体でいるんですけど

segments.text: So Young Link can land down throw into forward tilt at what percentage?
segments.original_text: あのー子供リンクは下投げ横強が入るパーセント
あーなるほどなるほど

full_text: Yeah, yeah Not that the players can hear this, but... So Young Link can land down throw into forward tilt at what percentage? Right, I see
